mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_accident_report ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_accident_report ( case_description, disaster_type, is_near_miss, is_fatal, leave_over_month, leave_under_month, freq_none, occurrence_cycle, related_process, sort_order, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{caseDescription}, #{disasterType}, #{isNearMiss}, #{isFatal}, #{leaveOverMonth}, #{leaveUnderMonth}, #{freqNone}, #{occurrenceCycle}, #{relatedProcess}, #{sortOrder}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_accident_report SET case_description = #{caseDescription}, disaster_type = #{disasterType}, is_near_miss = #{isNearMiss}, is_fatal = #{isFatal}, leave_over_month = #{leaveOverMonth}, leave_under_month = #{leaveUnderMonth}, freq_none = #{freqNone}, occurrence_cycle = #{occurrenceCycle}, related_process = #{relatedProcess}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
